title: Luscious Lime American Chicken Wrap
description: A crisp, sweet and tangy chicken wrap packed with lime zest and a crunchy protein boost, perfect for a quick romantic meal.
instructions: Season the chicken strips with lime zest, lime juice, garlic powder, smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper, then toss to coat evenly.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat, add the olive oil, and cook the chicken for 5 minutes until golden and cooked through.
Take a tortilla, warm it in the skillet for 30 seconds on each side, then spread a thin layer of Greek yogurt over the center.
Lay the cooked chicken strips onto the yogurt, sprinkle chopped cilantro and crushed almonds over the top.
Fold the sides of the tortilla in, then roll tightly to enclose the filling, ensuring the wrap is sealed.
Place the wrapped tortilla seam-side down in the skillet and cook for 2 minutes, then flip and cook the other side for 1 minute.
Remove from heat, slice the wrap diagonally, and serve warm.
Optionally drizzle a little lime juice over the top for extra zing.
Serve immediately with a side of cucumber slices or a light salad.
Enjoy your high-protein, low-carb crunchy wrap!
